verses.text: Ahih hangin tua thu hangin Jonah lungkim hetloin a heh hi

Topa' kiangah thu ngen a, “Kong thum hi, Topa aw; ka gamsungah ka omlai pekin hici mah in teh, ci hilo ka hi hiam? Hanciamin Tarshish khua-ah ka taisimna zong tua hang mah ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen a hehpih thei Pasian, a hehhak, a migi mahmah, siatna tun'sak ding a kisiknuam Pasian na hihna kong thei hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, tu-in ka nuntakna hong la in, ci-in kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntak sangin kei-a' dingin a hoihzaw hi,” a ci hi
Topa in zong, “Na heh ding kilawm sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin khuapi pualamah Jonah paikhia a, nisuahna lamah ama-a' ding bukno khat lamin tua lai-ah a tu hi. Tua khuapi bang hong ci ding hiam, cih a en dingin a buk liim nuai-ah tu-in a ngak hi
Topa Pasian in zong Jonah a liah ding leh a lungkhamna a tawldamsak dingin umgui khat a tungah a zaamsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua umgui hangin Jonah lungdam mahmah hi
Ahih hangin a zingsang khuavak ciangin Pasian in tua umgui lungno khat nesak ahih manin a keu hi

Ni hong suah ciangin Pasian in nisuahna lam panin huih a sa mahmah nungsak a, ni in zong Jonah' luzang kapsuk veva ahih manin a gim mahmah hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka nuntak sangin si leng kei-a' dingin hoihzaw hi,” ci-in a sihna ding thu a ngen hi
Ahih hangin Pasian in Jonah kiangah, “Tua umgui hangin na heh ding kilawm sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Jonah in, “Ka heh ding kilawm sa thamloin hehlua-in ka si zongin kilawm ka sa veve hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Nang in na gimpih lohpi, na khan'sak lohpi, zan khat thu-in hong piangin zan khat thu mahin a si tua umgui pammaih na sa hi

Tua ahih leh keimah in ganhing tampi thamlo, a taklam khut leh a veilam khut nangawn a khenthei nailo naupang tul za leh tul sawmnih sangin a tamzawte' ten'na, a lian mahmah Nineveh khuapi pammaih salo ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dawngkik hi.
